text: sry the story is kinda bad i wrote it in like 10 mins
It was the middle of the night...

speaker: Betty Richman
text: Hm, I thought I heard a noise...

speaker: News Reporter
text: Last night, the young heiress Betty Richman was kidnapped.

speaker: News Reporter
text: Betty Richman is known as the daughter of Alistair Richman, the richest man in this city. Whoever kidnapped her must be after a hefty ransom...

speaker: Jancy P. Lawyer
text: Ughh...When are they going to put on the cartoons again? I dont want to hear about crime outside of when I have to for work...
All of a sudden, the phone rings...

speaker: [Unknown Voice]
text: Hello, is this the Jancy P. Lawyer Law Firm?

speaker: Jancy
text: Um...yes? Who am I speaking to?

speaker: [Unknown Voice]
text: Please, you have to help me! I'm sure you've seen me and my family on the news - my name is Alistair Richman, and my daughter has been kidnapped! The kidnappers are demanding an outrageous ransom of 500,000 dollars!

speaker: Alistair
text: You must help me to find the true culprit and bring them to justice!!!!!!!!

speaker: Jancy
text: I mean don't you need to call the police for that? Like i'm a lawyer its not my job to investigate crimes sir

speaker: Alistair
text: Well, of course! But the police currently suspect our maid to be the kidnapper, and it would be quite inconvenient for our family if she were to be arrested. So i would like you to be her defense lawyer in court, and assist in gathering as much information as possible to bring my daughter home!
Alistair has hung the phone up without waiting for your acceptance of the job. It seems you are hired!

speaker: Jancy
text: Hm...I guess if he's rich then I'll get paid well. This seems like a pretty good deal...
